Info

TypedDict for ContextRegistry parameters.

class ats_utilities.context.context_params.ContextParams[source]¶

Bases: TypedDict

TypedDict defining parameter types for ContextRegistry.

checker: IChecker¶
logger: ILogger¶
reporter: IReporter¶
verbose: bool¶
